untranslatable_reason: Gap size of exactly 1% cannot be precisely measured with available indicators. The signal requires calculating the percentage difference between open and previous close (gap_pct = (open - prev_close) / prev_close), then checking if abs(gap_pct) == 0.01. This calculation is not supported by the allowed indicator set. Entry conditions approximated as directional gap (open vs prev_close) but cannot enforce the strict 1% threshold.
translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent (long on up-gaps, short on down-gaps). Hold period is 1 day (market open to close). The exit 'at close of day' is represented with hold_days_max=1. The precise 1% gap detection is not translatable without a custom gap_pct indicator.
